mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resourceFile ( resourceId, originalFilename, storedFilename, filePath, fileType, fileSize, uploadedAt ) VALUES ( #{resourceId}, #{originalFilename}, #{storedFilename}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT fileId, resourceId, originalFilename, storedFilename, filePath, fileType, fileSize, uploadedAt FROM resourceFile WHERE resourceId = #{resourceId} ORDER BY uploadedAt DESC, fileId DESC

SELECT fileId, resourceId, originalFilename, storedFilename, filePath, fileType, fileSize, uploadedAt FROM resourceFile WHERE resourceId = #{resourceId} AND filePath = #{filePath} ORDER BY fileId DESC LIMIT 1
